notes: VIX calm at 16.4 with futures extending gains after a record week and soft June payrolls (57k) chilling hike odds, but chip/memory rotation still drags (MU -13.3%, AMAT falling again) and cash is just $67, so hold defensive 0.5 with little room to add.
journal_entry: Mon 7/6 09:00: neutral/0.5, VIX 16.4, day P&L +5. Post-holiday reopen firm on soft-jobs/rate-cut hopes; MU/AMAT still worst drags and parked in avoid. Watching busy tech-earnings week and Jul 6-10 econ data, plus MarketWatch 'momentum unwind' warning.
